allow: Bash(npm install @tiptap/react @tiptap/starter-kit @tiptap/pm zustand @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities lucide-react date-fns slugify axios)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: complete Phase 3 - SEO, Preview & Featured Image

Phase 3: SEO & Preview
- Add SEO Panel with title, description, keyword & auto-slug generation
- Add SEO Indicator with score calculation and checklist
- Add Blog Preview with Desktop/Mobile toggle
- Add Featured Image uploader with header image reuse option

Components:
- SEOPanel: SEO fields with character counters
- SEOIndicator: Real-time SEO score \(0-100\) with 7 checks
- BlogPreview: Live preview of blog post
- PreviewFrame: Device toggle \(Desktop/Mobile\)
- FeaturedImageUploader: Teaser image with crop visualization

Improvements:
- Add seo-analyzer.ts for SEO scoring logic
- Extend BlogPost type with featuredImage & useFeaturedImageFromHeader
- Add store actions: setFeaturedImage, setUseFeaturedImageFromHeader
- Update PROJEKTPLAN.md: Tasks 12-14B marked as done

All TypeScript validations passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: complete Tasks 17-18 - RelatedPosts & Publish Flow

- TASK-017: RelatedPosts component with WP API integration, search & multi-select \(max 3\)
- TASK-018: PublishButton with toast notifications, loading states, and error handling
- Added react-hot-toast for notification system
- Created ToastProvider and integrated into layout
- Extended RelatedPost type with slug property
- Updated PROJEKTPLAN.md status to done

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
